title: The Tapping Solution
author: Nick Ortner
subline: A proven system to reduce stress, relieve pain, and reclaim your life.
customHTML:
<svg viewBox="0 0 1600 2400" preserveAspectRatio="xMidYMid slice" style="position:absolute;inset:0;width:100%;height:100%">
  <!-- A face profile in side view, drawn in hairlines, with 9 RED dots marking the 9 EFT tapping meridian points. Title sits below. -->
  <g transform="translate(800 1240)" fill="none" stroke-width="2">
    <!-- The face profile (left-facing) -->
    <path d="M 0 -400 C 80 -400 140 -360 160 -300 C 180 -240 180 -200 160 -160 C 140 -120 140 -80 160 -40 C 200 0 240 40 220 100 C 200 160 160 200 100 220 C 60 240 30 280 30 320 C 30 360 60 380 80 400 L 80 440" stroke="#cccccc"/>
    <!-- The eye (small detail) -->
    <circle cx="120" cy="-200" r="6" fill="#cccccc"/>
    <!-- The ear -->
    <path d="M 60 -100 C 40 -100 30 -80 30 -60 C 30 -40 40 -20 60 -20" stroke="#cccccc"/>
    <!-- 9 RED tapping points — small red circles with concentric rings -->
    <g fill="#fc1c46" stroke="#fc1c46">
      <circle cx="100" cy="-320" r="12"/>
      <circle cx="100" cy="-320" r="20" fill="none" stroke-width="1.5"/>
    </g>
    <text x="100" y="-360" text-anchor="middle" font-family="'Sui','Söhne','Inter',system-ui,sans-serif" font-size="11" font-weight="500" fill="#fc1c46" letter-spacing="0.04em">1. CROWN</text>

    <g fill="#fc1c46" stroke="#fc1c46">
      <circle cx="80" cy="-280" r="10"/>
    </g>
    <text x="-20" y="-280" text-anchor="end" font-family="'Sui','Söhne','Inter',system-ui,sans-serif" font-size="10" font-weight="500" fill="#fc1c46">2. BROW</text>

    <g fill="#fc1c46" stroke="#fc1c46">
      <circle cx="120" cy="-240" r="10"/>
    </g>
    <text x="220" y="-240" font-family="'Sui','Söhne','Inter',system-ui,sans-serif" font-size="10" font-weight="500" fill="#fc1c46">3. SIDE EYE</text>

    <g fill="#fc1c46" stroke="#fc1c46">
      <circle cx="130" cy="-160" r="10"/>
    </g>
    <text x="240" y="-160" font-family="'Sui','Söhne','Inter',system-ui,sans-serif" font-size="10" font-weight="500" fill="#fc1c46">4. UNDER EYE</text>

    <g fill="#fc1c46" stroke="#fc1c46">
      <circle cx="140" cy="-100" r="10"/>
    </g>
    <text x="240" y="-100" font-family="'Sui','Söhne','Inter',system-ui,sans-serif" font-size="10" font-weight="500" fill="#fc1c46">5. UNDER NOSE</text>

    <g fill="#fc1c46" stroke="#fc1c46">
      <circle cx="140" cy="-40" r="10"/>
    </g>
    <text x="240" y="-40" font-family="'Sui','Söhne','Inter',system-ui,sans-serif" font-size="10" font-weight="500" fill="#fc1c46">6. CHIN</text>

    <g fill="#fc1c46" stroke="#fc1c46">
      <circle cx="60" cy="80" r="10"/>
    </g>
    <text x="-40" y="80" text-anchor="end" font-family="'Sui','Söhne','Inter',system-ui,sans-serif" font-size="10" font-weight="500" fill="#fc1c46">7. COLLARBONE</text>

    <g fill="#fc1c46" stroke="#fc1c46">
      <circle cx="160" cy="120" r="10"/>
    </g>
    <text x="260" y="120" font-family="'Sui','Söhne','Inter',system-ui,sans-serif" font-size="10" font-weight="500" fill="#fc1c46">8. UNDER ARM</text>

    <g fill="#fc1c46" stroke="#fc1c46">
      <circle cx="80" cy="320" r="10"/>
    </g>
    <text x="-40" y="320" text-anchor="end" font-family="'Sui','Söhne','Inter',system-ui,sans-serif" font-size="10" font-weight="500" fill="#fc1c46">9. THUMB</text>
  </g>
</svg>
rationale: EFT IS the 9 tapping points. A face profile (hairline stroke) faces right; 9 red dots mark the 9 meridian points — crown, brow, side eye, under eye, under nose, chin, collarbone, under arm, thumb. Each red dot is labeled in tiny red type. The face is the 'before'; the dots are the 'after' — energy release. Title sits in the bottom 1/3, weight 500 command, mixed-case. Brand 'EFT' in the top-left; pill 'TAP · TAP' at the top — the rhythm of the practice.
